case_title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. TIRSA AZUCENA ZULETA et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $525.00 RE 21508 FOR TRANSACTION W2208812R018 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO DEUTSCHE BANK NATL TRUST, DOC 1901380416, WARRANT #38002261, DATED AUG-25-2008

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CARRINGTON MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZULETA, TIRSA AZUCENA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED THE PREMISES ON 8/20/08. $395.00 COSTS, $4,650.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
